non_blocking_issues: cappedNavPush uses visibleItemsInfo.firstOrNull()?.size as a uniform proxy for items 1..target-1; with variable-height messages the cap can overestimate and still overshoot to index 0 in edge cases.
cappedNavPush comment claims firstVisibleItemIndex >= target-1, but with uniform item sizes the scroll lands at index 1; comment is arithmetically misleading.
createSessionInWorkdir does not clear ChatState.currentModel, so a draft opened after a real session can leak the previous session's model (pre-existing, more visible now).
Instrumented bounce test asserts final index > 0; an afterJump > 0 assertion + variable-height scenario would strengthen coverage.
notes: Both fixes directionally correct; tests faithfully exercise the bugs. draft-model persistence ordering (setModelForSession before dispatchSendMessage) is safe and synchronous.
